articles.title: Jackson Pollock painting sells for record $181m at auction - BBC
articles.description: The Abstract Expressionist's Number 7A, 1948 painting is now his most expensive artwork ever sold at auction.
articles.content: Number 7A, 1948, which went under the hammer at the renowned Christie's auction house on Monday, smashed the previous record for the most a work by the late American artist has taken at auction.
